'''Galactic Footwear''' was a shoe and footgear sales shop that was located on the [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorian]] herdship [[Bazaar (Ithorian Herdship)|''Bazaar'']].

==Appearances==
*''[[Graveyard of Alderaan]]'' {{Reprint|Graveyard of Alderaan}}
